commit_scope: External tensor data model as HF-like loadable file (tensor-file.fk) + minimal Form-native learning loop showing promise (ml-toy-loop.fk). Uses CHOICE/FAIL/STOP/STORE/RESTORE + JIT note + A/B with local HF guide stub + persist to external tensor + satsang/mesh alignment stubs. Toy scalar predict as trans proxy. First gaps closed per north-star plan (after merge/rebase of prior fourth work).

commands: write tensor-file.fk (external HF-like load/save + intern + toy matrix)
write ml-toy-loop.fk (primitives in loop + A/B guide + persist + satsang/mesh stubs + JIT note)
python harness + Form driver run (LOAD external, forward, A/B, learn, STORE, PROMISE markers)
spec source symbols updated + Go comment for registry/symbol drift

results.tensor_external: load-tensor / save-tensor / tf-* accessors; json header+data; intern for identity; usable in M4-style
results.loop_promise: toy predict + learn step + CHOICE/FAIL/STOP/STORE/RESTORE exercised; A/B vs HF-stub guide; external file persisted with updated w; loss improve visible in harness; satsang/mesh stubs present
results.pure_form: loop + loader are .fk recipes; carriers only for file I/O + guide bridge (MLX/HF as temporary)
results.drift_tend: spec symbols corrected; float_to_int/temp_dir noted in code for registry
